allow: PowerShell($d = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($d\) { "docker: $\($d.Source\)" } else { "no docker" }; $p = Get-Command psql -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "psql: $\($p.Source\)" } else { "no psql" }; supabase --version)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "dev server anterior encerrado" } else { "nada na 5173" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ext=d.get\('external',{}\); print\(' google :', ext.get\('google'\)\); print\(' email  :', ext.get\('email'\)\); print\(' phone  :', ext.get\('phone'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('   -> user id:',d.get\('id'\),'| email:',d.get\('email'\),'| erro:',d.get\('msg'\) or d.get\('error_description'\) or d.get\('code'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);[print\('   nome:',x['nome'],'| role:',x['role'],'| auth_user_id:',x['auth_user_id']\) for x in d]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('  OK - token emitido' if d.get\('access_token'\) else '  FALHA: '+str\(d\)\)")
Bash(python -c "cpf='paciente.teste1@example.com'; import re; d=re.sub\(r'\\D','',cpf\); print\('  vira e-mail sintetico:', d+'@geny.local  -> nao existe, por isso falha'\)")
